text: One thing that really keeps me up at
night is the mystery of what Nicola
Tesla was really working on. Near the
end of his life, Nicola Tesla became
increasingly secretive about his
research and inventions. One project in
particular was a super weapon that he
referred to as the Teleforce. But in the
years since has become known as the
Death Ray, a machine that he claimed
would be used to end all wars by
shooting a beam of high energy particles
across vast distances. As countries
moved closer to the beginning of World
War II, Tesla continued to brag about
the death ray to any reporter who would
listen. and tried to sell his plans to
various governments including the US,
the UK, and the USSR. When he passed
away in 1943 after spending years in
isolation, a US government agency called
the Office of Alien Property seized all
of Tesla's belongings and papers related
to any research he was conducting in his
hotel room. It is now widely believed
that he wasn't anywhere close to the
invention he claimed to be on the cusp
of. And some, but not all, of the
documents that the government sees that
day have now been made available to the
